title: orlaya daucoides
intro: Orlaya daucoides, also known as the man's pepper or horned poppy, is a biennial flowering plant in the carrot family (Apiaceae). It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Orlaya daucoides include its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as coughs and colds, as well as its potential to soothe digestive problems and reduce fever. Orlaya daucoides can be prepared into herbal remedies, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
